name: FRM: Alien Keys Rhythm
description: 3-voice Klee shift-register sequencer with resonant filter

knobs.5: Sync / hocket mode (CCW=sync with gate 2, noon=always fire, CW=hocket)

cv_out.1: Top voice pitch (1V/oct, 0V = MIDI 60 / middle C)
cv_out.2: Bottom voice pitch (1V/oct, 0V = MIDI 60 / middle C)

leds: 16-step sequencer position across 8 LEDs (2 steps per LED; bright=active, dim=inactive)
